Jobs ENG বাংলা Create Account Sign In For Employer Create Sign In Home Jobs Mybdjobs Job List The White Horse Pharmaceuticals Ltd. DIC (Depot In Charge) Application Deadline : 11 Mar 2026 Apply Now Shortlist Share: Facebook LinkedIn WhatsApp All Requirements Responsibilities Company Information Summary Vacancy: -- Age: 20 to 35 years Location: Anywhere in Bangladesh Salary: Tk. 15000 - 25000 (Monthly) Published: 09 Feb 2026 To access Application Insights Get Bdjobs Pro Requirements Experience Additional Requirements Age 20 to 35 years Responsibilities & Context Should have sound knowledge on computer (Excel, word, power point etc.). Should have knowledge on account. Workplace Work at office Employment Status Full Time Gender Only males are allowed to apply. Job Location Anywhere in Bangladesh Company Information The White Horse Pharmaceuticals Ltd. Follow More jobs from this company Address: 68, Dilkusha C/A (6th Floor), Dhaka-1000 Website: www.whitehorsepharma.com Business: The White Horse Pharmaceuticals Ltd. A Swiss Born Company started its journey since 1991 in Switzerland and activated in Bangladesh in 1996. Every smile is important. That`s why we work to protect you and your smile. We are a company which is working to ensure your happiness and safety. Our-state-of-the-art world class plant with modern facilities on a 4.5 acres land in Sreepur, Gazipur which complies with cGMP-WHO requirements is the perfect exposition of a proficient pharmaceuticals company. Presently, we are exporting to many countries and playing an important role in the global arena as well as domestic market, for the improvement of people`s health to see a face of full smile. As an integral part of this journey The White Horse Pharmaceuticals Ltd. is seeking dynamic, responsible & innovative individual. Radiographer (Male) : Mercury Medical Ltd Jobs ENG বাংলা Create Account Sign In For Employer Create Sign In Home Jobs Mybdjobs Job List Mercury Medical Ltd Radiographer (Male) Application Deadline : 22 Mar 2026 Shortlist Share: Facebook LinkedIn WhatsApp All Requirements Responsibilities Salary & Benefits Company Information Summary Vacancy: 1 Age: 25 to 35 years Location: Dhaka (GULSHAN 2) Salary: Tk. 20000 - 25000 (Monthly) Published: 22 Feb 2026 Applicants are encouraged to submit Video CV. To access Application Insights Get Bdjobs Pro Requirements Education Experience Additional Requirements Age 25 to 35 years Must be fluent in English. Must be computer literate and be able to type. Excellent communication and interpersonal skills. Responsibilities & Context About Us We are located in Gulshan 2 Dhaka and are authorized to conduct medical examinations for various worldwide immigration departments to ensure the health of overseas-bound travelers. Job Context We are looking for a qualified, detail-oriented and well rounded male Radiographer with at least 5 years of clinical experience to perform chest X-rays. No late or night shifts will be required. Job Responsibilities: Performing x-rays (mainly chest), ensuring all local and external guidelines are followed to provide this service in a manner that upholds client and your personal safety. Ensuring the quality of all x-ray images taken, and raise concerns re: x-ray quality for discussion with panel physicians Participating in internal audits as required by management, in collaboration with the radiologist, to ensure ongoing x-ray quality control Operating imaging equipment in line with manufacturer guidelines, and be responsible, in collaboration with the senior radiographer, to maintain the radiography equipment as per manufacturer guidelines Interacting with all clients courteously and professionally, ensuring client and personal safety, comfort and ensuring the highest level of customer service. Compensation & Other Benefits Festival Bonus: 2 2 full festival bonus Annual/Performance Bonus Provident Fund Health Insurance Leave Encashment Gratuity Yearly Increment Benefits upon permanent employment: Employee provident fund with salary matching, Health insurance provided by the company, 100% twice yearly festival bonus, Annual performance bonus, Structured leave policy & opportunity to encash annual leave, Overtime allowance. Workplace Work at office Employment Status Full Time Gender Only males are allowed to apply. Job Location Dhaka (GULSHAN 2) Job Highlights Work in a modern diagnostic center. Collaborate with experienced panel physicians, on the job training from day one Full-time structured role with defined duties. Read Before Apply E-mail your CV (mercurymedicalltd@gmail.com) and include "Applying for the Radiographer position" in the subject line. Job Responsibilities: Performing laboratory tests and procedures as per your training and external/manufacturer guidelines, in a manner ensuring your own and client safety. Engaging with quality control programs and procedures as required. Engaging with training for new lab procedures and equipment as required. Participating in external training programs as required by the management or local regulatory authorities. Interacting with all clients courteously and professionally. Overseeing the cleaning staff to always maintain the lab areas to a high standard of cleanliness and hygiene. We train them and introduce them to great companies in the USA. Our goal is to make it easy for companies to find the right people and help skilled workers succeed. Project Manager : Muller International Limited Jobs ENG বাংলা Create Account Sign In For Employer Create Sign In Home Jobs Mybdjobs Job List Muller International Limited Project Manager Application Deadline : 06 Apr 2026 Apply Now Shortlist Share: Facebook LinkedIn WhatsApp All Requirements Responsibilities Company Information Summary Vacancy: 1 Location: Cox`s Bazar (Maheshkhali) Salary: Negotiable Published: 07 Mar 2026 Applicants are encouraged to submit Video CV. Application Insights View Requirements Education Experience Additional Requirements Strong knowledge of construction project management principles and practices. Familiarity with international construction standards, quality control, and safety requirements. Knowledge of project scheduling, cost control, resource management, and contract administration. Understanding of coordination with international clients, consultants, and engineers. Proficiency in MS Office applications, especially PowerPoint for presentations, Excel for reporting, and Word for documentation. Experience in preparing project progress reports and presentations for client meetings. Experience Minimum 08–10 years of experience in construction project management. Proven experience in mega construction projects such as industrial plants, infrastructure, power plants, or large commercial buildings. Experience working with Japanese engineers, international consultants, or multinational project teams. Experience in managing contractors, subcontractors, and project teams on large construction sites. Skills and Abilities: Strong leadership and team management skills. Excellent communication skills in English for coordination with international clients and engineers. Ability to coordinate with multidisciplinary teams and stakeholders. Strong problem-solving and decision-making abilities. Ability to manage multiple tasks and deadlines in a high-pressure environment. Skills & Expertise Mega construction project management Project planning and scheduling Coordination with international engineers and consultants Construction supervision and quality control Budget and cost management Risk management and problem resolution Preparation of project presentations and reports using MS Office Responsibilities & Context Job Summary: The Project Manager (Construction) will be responsible for planning, coordinating, and supervising all construction activities to ensure that the project is completed on time, within budget, and in compliance with quality and safety standards. The role requires close coordination with clients, international consultants, engineers, contractors, and site teams. Reporting to: Managing Director Job Location Matarbari, Maheshkhali, Cox`s Bazar, Bangladesh Duties & Responsibilities as Project Manager: Plan, organize, and supervise all construction activities at the project site. Coordinate with clients, consultants, Japanese/international engineers, and contractors. Prepare and monitor project schedules, work plan

Safety Supervisor : Muller International Limited Jobs ENG বাংলা Create Account Sign In For Employer Create Sign In Home Jobs Mybdjobs Job List Muller International Limited Safety Supervisor Application Deadline : 06 Apr 2026 Apply Now Shortlist Share: Facebook LinkedIn WhatsApp All Requirements Responsibilities Company Information Summary Vacancy: 1 Location: Cox`s Bazar (Maheshkhali) Salary: Negotiable Published: 07 Mar 2026 Application Insights View Requirements Education Experience Additional Requirements Experience Minimum 2–4 years of experience in construction site safety supervision. Experience in handling safety procedures in building, infrastructure, or industrial construction projects. Prior experience working with contractors, labor teams, and project engineers. Knowledge and Experience: Knowledge of construction safety standards, regulations, and best practices. Understanding of Personal Protective Equipment (PPE) requirements and site safety controls. Familiarity with risk assessment, hazard identification, and incident investigation. Knowledge of emergency response procedures and accident prevention methods. Experience conducting toolbox meetings and safety training sessions. Skills and Abilities: Construction site safety management Hazard identification and risk assessment Incident and accident investigation Safety inspection and monitoring Knowledge of PPE and safety equipment Safety documentation and reporting Conducting toolbox talks and safety training. Good communication skills in English for coordination with international clients and engineers. Responsibilities & Context Job Summary: The Safety Supervisor is responsible for ensuring that all construction activities are carried out in compliance with Health, Safety, and Environment (HSE) standards. The role includes monitoring site activities, preventing accidents, conducting safety inspections, and ensuring workers follow all safety procedures. Job Location Matarbari, Maheshkhali, Cox`s Bazar, Bangladesh Reporting to: Project Manager Duties & Responsibilities as Safety Supervisor: Ensure all workers use appropriate PPE at all times. Conduct daily safety inspections of the construction site. Identify unsafe conditions and take immediate corrective actions. Conduct daily/weekly toolbox meetings to promote safety awareness. Ensure proper safety signage, barricades, and warning systems at work areas. Monitor high-risk activities such as working at height, lifting operations, excavation, and electrical work. Investigate accidents, incidents, and near-miss events, and prepare reports. Maintain safety records, checklists, and incident reports. Ensure compliance with company safety policies and local safety regulations. Coordinate with the project manager and engineers to implement safety improvements. Assist in emergency response and first aid arrangements at the construction site. Working Conditions: Site-based role with regular field supervision. May require working beyond standa

Jr. Executive - Telesales / Call Centre : Megamind Jobs ENG বাংলা Create Account Sign In For Employer Create Sign In Home Jobs Mybdjobs Job List Megamind Jr. Executive - Telesales / Call Centre Application Deadline : 12 Mar 2026 Apply Now Shortlist Share: Facebook LinkedIn WhatsApp All Requirements Responsibilities Skills & Expertise Salary & Benefits Company Information Summary Vacancy: 5 Age: 20 to 27 years Location: Dhaka (Banasree, Rampura) Salary: Tk. 10000 - 13000 (Monthly) Published: 08 Mar 2026 Application Insights View Requirements Education Additional Requirements Age 20 to 27 years Good communication in English and Bangla Ability to speak clear, smart Bangla with confidence Basic computer skills and data entry ability Target-oriented and disciplined work attitude IMPORTANT NOTICE: Applicants are advised to read the entire circular carefully before applying . Please research about Megamind Plus and the role on a computer before attending the interview. Applicants who come unprepared may not be considered. Responsibilities & Context Working Hours: 11:00 AM – 8:00 PM Working Days: 6 Days per Week (On-site Office) Role Overview Responsible for contacting prospective students, providing accurate information about study abroad opportunities and English proficiency courses, and supporting the admission process through proper communication and follow-up. Key Responsibilities Make minimum 150 outbound calls daily to prospective students. Provide clear information about destinations, programs, and admission processes. Conduct regular follow-up calls and convert leads into counseling appointments. Maintain proper call logs, data entry, and CRM/database updates . Coordinate with counselors for consultation scheduling. Communicate professionally with students at all times. Reporting, Monitoring & Compliance All calls and follow-ups must be properly recorded and reported . Regular call audits and monitoring will be conducted. False reporting is strictly prohibited . Daily targets, reporting accuracy, and follow-up quality must be maintained. (Fresher may also apply) Additional Requirements: Age 22 to 30 years. Basic understanding of accounting principles. Good knowledge of MS Excel & MS Office. Responsibilities & Context We are looking for a sincere, hardworking, and detail-oriented Accountant to support the financial and administrative operations of our law firm. This position offers an excellent opportunity for graduates to develop hands-on experience in corporate accounting and compliance. Job Responsibilities: Maintain day-to-day financial transactions and bookkeeping. Prepare vouchers, bills, invoices, and maintain proper documentation. Assist in bank reconciliation and petty cash management. Maintain client billing records and payment tracking. Support VAT & Tax documentation and compliance. Assist in preparing monthly financial reports. Coordinate with auditors when required. Maintain office expense records and filing system. Support office documentation and record management. Assist in vendor coordination and office supply management. Support payroll documentation and basic HR records. Perform other administrative duties assigned by management.
